name: Reitmans (Canada) Limited
summary: Reitmans (Canada) Limited primarily engages in the retail sale of women's wear apparel in Canada. The company's products include shirts, blouses, pants, dresses, skirts, sweaters, outerwear, activewear, lingerie, footwear, and accessories. It also offers apparel for men. The company serves customers through retail and e-commerce channels. As of October 31, 2020, it operated 418 stores, including 247 Reitmans, 92 Penningtons, and 79 RW&CO. The company was founded in 1926 and is based in Montreal, Canada.
